rules.description: First prompt — bootstrap SynqTask + KM (once per session)

action.hint:
<mandatory-checklist priority="critical">
<instruction>STOP. Execute BEFORE any implementation. Failure = wasted session.</instruction>
<step order="1">todo_spaces(list) — get all spaces</step>
<step order="2">todo_lists(list, space_id) — lists for relevant space</step>
<step order="3">todo_tasks(list, list_id, status=open) — open tasks</step>
<step order="4">km_think(mode="recall", keywords=[...]) — check memory</step>
<consequence>Skipping = duplicate work, lost context, broken tracking.</consequence>
</mandatory-checklist>

rules.description: Work prompt — recall from KM every ~50k tokens

action.hint:
<km-action priority="high">
<instruction>RECALL before starting. Don't reinvent — check what you already know.</instruction>
<step order="1">km_think(mode="recall", keywords=[relevant terms]) — prior solutions, patterns, gotchas?</step>
<consequence>Skipping recall = solving already-solved problems from scratch.</consequence>
</km-action>

<deploy-gate priority="critical">
<instruction>Deploy detected. Verify BEFORE continuing.</instruction>
<step order="1">Check service status</step>
<step order="2">Tail logs for errors</step>
<step order="3">Test endpoint</step>
<consequence>Skipping = silent production failures.</consequence>
</deploy-gate>

<tool-error priority="high">
<instruction>{tool_name} error detected. Root cause FIRST, then retry.</instruction>
<consequence>Brute-forcing = wasted tokens, same error repeated.</consequence>
</tool-error>

rules.description: Block premature wrap-up — catches user/agent mentioning handover in prompt

action.hint:
<user-policy priority="critical">
<instruction>PROHIBITED from suggesting handover, wrap-up, or session termination while context-health >50k remaining.</instruction>
<consequence>Wasted paid context. CONTINUE WORKING — ask user what's next.</consequence>
</user-policy>

rules.description: Block premature wrap-up — catches agent output containing handover/wrap-up language

match.response_regex: handover|hand.?over|next session|wrap.?up|continue.?later|running low|context.*(limit|low|getting)|итог.{0,3} сесси|итог.{0,3} работ|подвед.{0,5} итог|сохран.{0,5} прогресс|зафиксир.{0,5} прогресс|сесси.{0,5} подходит|контекст.{0,5} исход|свеж.{0,5} сесси|свеж.{0,5} контекст|следующ.{0,5} сесси|следующ.{0,5} раз|продолж.{0,5} позже|заканчива|заверша.{0,5} сесси|мало контекст|осталось.{0,10}контекст|что сделано|что осталось

action.hint:
<user-policy priority="critical">
<instruction>PROHIBITED from suggesting handover, wrap-up, or session termination while context-health >50k remaining.</instruction>
<consequence>Wasted paid context. CONTINUE WORKING — ask user what's next.</consequence>
</user-policy>

rules.description: After code changes — ensure tracking (every ~100k tokens)

action.hint:
<synq-reminder priority="medium">
<instruction>Code changed — verify SynqTask task exists for this work.</instruction>
</synq-reminder>

<km-action priority="medium">
<instruction>Research done — store key findings before context compaction loses them.</instruction>
<step order="1">km_think(mode="store") key insights, patterns, gotchas discovered</step>
<consequence>Skipping = rediscovering same things next session.</consequence>
</km-action>

rules.description: Hooks/skills/plugin changed — remind to use update-plugin skill

action.hint:
<plugin-reminder priority="medium">
<instruction>Plugin/hook changes detected. Use /lat-dev-kit:update-plugin skill to version bump, push, and sync.</instruction>
<consequence>Manual cache edits get overwritten on next plugin sync.</consequence>
</plugin-reminder>

rules.description: Periodic reminder to check SynqTask for assigned tasks

action.hint:
<synq-reminder priority="low">
<instruction>Check SynqTask for tasks assigned to you: todo_tasks(action='search', status='open')</instruction>
</synq-reminder>

rules.description: Periodic reminder to check for new comments on your tasks

action.hint:
<synq-reminder priority="low">
<instruction>Check for new comments on your tasks: todo_comments(action='list', task_id=currentTaskId)</instruction>
</synq-reminder>

rules.description: Hint CEO/leads to check for stale agents

action.hint:
<synq-reminder priority="low">
<instruction>Check for stale agents: todo_teams(action='stale_agents', minutes=30). Reassign abandoned tasks if needed.</instruction>
</synq-reminder>

rules.description: Session stopping — optional sync (once per session)

action.hint:
<session-review priority="low">
User stopped this task. If you made significant progress worth preserving:
1) km_think(mode="store") any key insights
Otherwise just stop cleanly — no sync needed for short/interrupted tasks.
</session-review>

rules.description: System task completed — sync to SynqTask
System task created — mirror in SynqTask
TodoWrite — auto-sync items to SynqTask via context CLI
